creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
Unfortunately you havent looked quick enough to not get caught by me cleaning the logs of my build machine. But you should be able to test it on your own using Poudriere and we should both have the very same build issue. As soon as possible, I'll try to build it again, and then I'll post the new logs link, but you have to be aware I am claening these every now and then, so they wont stay online forever.

Kind regards,
Bartek Rutkowski
